name: English Toasting Bread
recipeInstructions:
This is a special bread, coated with cornmeal, so it needs to be baked in a loaf pan in the oven. Heavenly with orange marmalade.
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except cornmeal.
2. Shape dough into a ball and place it on a floured surface.
3. Transfer dough evenly into an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan that has been greased and sprinkled with cornmeal on all sides.
4. Cover the pan loosely and let rise in a warm oven for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the dough nearly reaches the top of the pan.
5. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Warm setting for 2 minutes then turn off.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool.
